title: rubus lutescens
intro: Rubus lutescens, also known as Yellow Raspberry or Yellow Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus lutescens include its high content of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and vitamins, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus lutescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Rubus lutescens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and sore throats.
